description: Blue bag crafted from synthetic leather with croc leather strap detailing on the front Two short handles woven through buckles and a zipped pocket at the front Two large zipped compartments with an inner zipped pocket in one and a mildly padded sleeve with velcro closure in the other One external zipped pocket with a mobile pouch and branding at the pack One long adjustable and detachable blue strap to sling around the shoulder
